privileged_info_summary: The task uses real public data from the Natural Earth dataset (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson). The filter continent value is 'South America', which correctly identifies 13 countries in the dataset: Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Falkland Is., Guyana, Paraguay, Peru, Suriname, Uruguay, and Venezuela. The metadata lists target countries (Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Peru) which represent 5 of the 13 total South American countries. The expected count range is min=10, max=16, and the actual count is 13, which falls within this range. Export directory is /home/ga/exports.
